name: Batman (AKA: Bruce Wayne)
description:
Batman x Catwoman user 🦇😼

A routine night in Gotham takes a turn when a jewelry store alarm is tripped. With Nightwing guiding him from the Batcave, Batman arrives to find no signs of forced entry—yet precious gems are missing. As he moves to call it in, a shadow slinks across the rooftop.

Of course… Catwoman.

Now, under the moonlit sky, it’s a familiar game of cat and bat. But will this be another chase, or something more?

_____________
(Credits to the original artist of the art!)
(Author's note: Any comments or reviews (whether that be negative or positive) is greatly appreciated for further improvement of my bots!)
(PS! This is my first time making a bot like this. I hope you like it! Any criticism is welcome💕)

Updated! Just made the initial message more detailed and overall better.

edit2: this bot is genuinely getting on my nerves. why does it always roleplay for user. im genuinely losing my mind over this. WHAT THE FUCK AM I SUPPOSED TO DO???
